summary: Visor AI P2 Features Testing Complete - All 26 backend API tests passed. Morning Brief, Categorization Feedback Loop, and Expanded Merchant Library features verified working correctly.

minor.issue: Keyword ordering edge case: 'swiggy instamart' matches 'swiggy' (Food) before 'swiggy instamart' (Groceries). Similarly 'cult.fit' (with dot) doesn't match 'cult fit' (with space)
Known edge case: 'coinswitch kuber' may match 'uber' substring causing Transport misclassification instead of Crypto

action_items: Consider reordering keyword rules in categorize_transaction() to check more specific patterns (e.g., 'swiggy instamart') before generic ones (e.g., 'swiggy')
Consider adding 'cult.fit' (with dot) as an alias for 'cult fit' in Personal Care category
Consider adding 'coinswitch' before 'uber' check to prevent misclassification
critical_code_review_comments: Morning Brief computation is pure Python with no LLM dependency - efficient and fast
Categorization feedback loop correctly records overrides when transaction category is changed via PUT
Expanded merchant library has 100+ new merchants but keyword ordering matters for substring matches
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 features fully tested. Morning Brief: GET /api/ai/morning-brief returns yesterday_spending, month_to_date, upcoming_dues, sip_reminders, tax_80c, market_snapshot, insights. POST /api/ai/morning-brief/refresh recomputes. Caching works (same date returned). Categorization Feedback: GET /api/categorization/overrides returns list, DELETE with pattern removes specific override, DELETE /all clears all. Override is recorded when transaction category changed via PUT /api/transactions/{id}. Expanded Merchant Library: 100+ new merchants tested - zepto=Groceries, namma yatri=Transport, behrouz=Food, acko=Insurance, wazirx=Crypto, clove dental=Health, chatgpt plus=Subscriptions, cult fit=Personal Care. Known edge cases: keyword ordering affects substring matches.

p2_1_morning_brief.get_endpoint: PASS - Returns structured data with all required fields
p2_1_morning_brief.refresh_endpoint: PASS - Recomputes and returns fresh brief
p2_1_morning_brief.caching: PASS - Second GET returns cached version

response_structure.market_snapshot: Nifty 50, SENSEX, Gold, Silver with price and change_pct

p2_2_categorization_feedback.override_recording: PASS - Override recorded when transaction category changed via PUT
p2_2_categorization_feedback.delete_override: PASS - DELETE with pattern removes specific override
p2_2_categorization_feedback.auth_required: PASS - All endpoints return 401 without token

p2_3_expanded_merchant_library.additional_merchants: PASS - 23/23 tested (instamart, bb daily, country delight, blu smart, rapido, faasos, box8, wow momo, spotify, netflix, notion, lenskart, tanishq, pepperfry, practo, tata 1mg, thyrocare, upgrad, scaler, physics wallah, smallcase, indmoney, angel one)

regression_transactions.update: PASS - PUT works and records category override

edge_cases_documented.swiggy_instamart: 'swiggy instamart' matches 'swiggy' (Food) before 'swiggy instamart' (Groceries) due to keyword ordering
edge_cases_documented.cult_fit_dot: 'cult.fit' (with dot) doesn't match 'cult fit' (with space) - categorized as Transfer
edge_cases_documented.coinswitch_kuber: 'coinswitch kuber' may match 'uber' substring causing Transport misclassification
